message:
feat(conformance): expand differential/metamorphic/adversarial test coverage for iter, IO, linalg, RNG, and ufunc subsystems

Substantially broaden the conformance harness to cover the five
remaining packet contract surfaces (FNP-P2C-004 through 009) with
full differential, metamorphic, and adversarial fixture suites, new
generator binaries for final evidence packs and optimization reports,
and a performance budget gate for CI regression detection.

New conformance suites wired into the security, test-contract, and
workflow-scenario gates:

  iter (FNP-P2C-004):
    - iter_differential_cases.json: 20+ cases exercising
      select_transfer_class, overlap_copy_policy, validate_flatiter_read,
      validate_flatiter_write, and validate_nditer_flags with expected
      transfer-class and overlap-action oracle outputs.
    - iter_metamorphic_cases.json: deterministic invariant checks for
      repeatability, idempotence, and count-law properties of the
      iterator protocol.
    - iter_adversarial_cases.json: hostile payloads (out-of-bounds
      indices, zero-length flatiter writes, conflicting nditer flags)
      expecting stable reason-code failures.
    - oracle_outputs/iter_differential_report.json: machine-readable
      zero-mismatch baseline.

  IO (FNP-P2C-009):
    - io_differential_cases.json: cases covering NPY/NPZ magic
      validation, header schema roundtrip, load dispatch classification,
      memmap contract, and policy metadata with expected dispatch and
      reason-code oracles.
    - io_metamorphic_cases.json: idempotent header, dispatch, policy,
      and budget validation invariants.
    - oracle_outputs/io_differential_report.json: machine-readable
      zero-mismatch baseline.

  RNG (FNP-P2C-007):
    - rng_adversarial_cases.json and rng_metamorphic_cases.json added
      as new fixture files (the differential cases already existed).
    - oracle_outputs/rng_differential_report.json: updated baseline.

  Linalg (FNP-P2C-008):
    - oracle_outputs/linalg_differential_report.json: updated baseline.

  Ufunc (FNP-P2C-005):
    - oracle_outputs/ufunc_differential_mismatch_report.json: updated
      mismatch baseline.

Conformance library (lib.rs) changes:
  - Define IoDifferentialCase, IoMetamorphicCase, IoAdversarialCase
    (extended with new traceability fields: expected_reason_code,
    expected_dispatch, expected_magic_version, expected_count).
  - Define IterDifferentialCase, IterMetamorphicCase,
    IterAdversarialCase, and supporting input structs
    (IterSelectorFixtureInput, IterOverlapFixtureInput,
    IterFlatIndexFixtureInput, IterFlagsFixtureInput).
  - Define IoDifferentialReportArtifact/Mismatch and
    IterDifferentialReportArtifact/Mismatch for oracle report emission.
  - Add loader functions load_iter_{differential,metamorphic,adversarial}_cases.
  - Refactor run_shape_stride_suite into per-case evaluate_shape_stride_case
    for improved readability and testability.
  - Wire all new suites (run_iter_*, run_io_differential_suite,
    run_io_metamorphic_suite) into the public API surface.

Gate binary changes:
  - run_security_gate.rs: register iter_* and io_differential/metamorphic
    suites in the gate suite list.
  - run_test_contract_gate.rs: same suite registration, plus wire
    iter/io/linalg fixture-id collections into the workflow-scenario
    fixture cross-reference validator.
  - run_workflow_scenario_gate.rs: add replay_command to GateSummary,
    register shape_stride, iter, io, and linalg fixture collections and
    replay scripts in the forensics artifact index.
  - generate_benchmark_baseline.rs: add --output-path CLI flag for
    CI-friendly baseline emission.

New generator binaries (packets 004-009):
  - generate_packet{004..009}_final_evidence_pack.rs: each assembles
    the final evidence bundle for its respective packet.
  - generate_packet{004..009}_optimization_report.rs: each generates
    optimization-profile and isomorphism-evidence artifacts.
  - run_performance_budget_gate.rs: new gate binary that compares
    current benchmark baselines against a budget envelope and emits
    pass/fail JSONL logs.

Test contract expansion (test_contracts.rs):
  - Validate workflow step cross-references for shape_stride_case,
    iter_fixture_case (differential|adversarial), io_fixture_case
    (differential|adversarial), and linalg_fixture_case
    (differential|adversarial) kinds.
  - Extend workflow links.differential_fixture_ids validation to cover
    all fixture collections, not just ufunc_input_cases.

Workflow scenario corpus (workflow_scenario_corpus.json):
  - Add 10+ new golden-path and adversarial workflow scenarios covering
    packets P2C-004 through P2C-009, with full step definitions,
    differential_fixture_ids links, e2e_script_paths, and prioritized
    gap beads.

Fixture README updated to document all new fixture files and oracle
output artifacts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -7,14 +7,24 @@ This folder stores normalized oracle-vs-target fixtures for `fnp-conformance`.
 - `dtype_promotion_cases.json`: deterministic promotion-table checks.
 - `runtime_policy_cases.json`: strict/hardened fail-closed policy checks with structured log context.
 - `runtime_policy_adversarial_cases.json`: malformed/unknown wire-class inputs proving fail-closed behavior.
+- `iter_differential_cases.json`: packet `FNP-P2C-004` iterator differential corpus for selector/overlap/flag/flatiter behavior parity.
+- `iter_metamorphic_cases.json`: deterministic iterator metamorphic invariants (repeatability/idempotence/count laws).
+- `iter_adversarial_cases.json`: hostile iterator payloads expecting stable reason-code failures.
+- `rng_differential_cases.json`: packet `FNP-P2C-007` deterministic RNG differential witness corpus.
+- `rng_metamorphic_cases.json`: deterministic RNG metamorphic invariants (jump additivity, fill/iter equivalence, bounded repeatability).
+- `rng_adversarial_cases.json`: hostile RNG payloads expecting bounded fail-closed reason-code outcomes.
+- `io_differential_cases.json`: packet `FNP-P2C-009` differential corpus for NPY/NPZ parser/dispatch contract checks.
+- `io_metamorphic_cases.json`: deterministic IO metamorphic invariants (idempotent header/dispatch/policy/budget validations).
 - `io_adversarial_cases.json`: parser-boundary adversarial IO corpus with severity-classified failure expectations.
 - `linalg_differential_cases.json`: packet `FNP-P2C-008` differential oracle corpus for solver/factorization/spectral/tolerance/backend/policy seams.
 - `linalg_metamorphic_cases.json`: deterministic linalg metamorphic invariants (solve scaling, qr determinism, lstsq tuple consistency).
 - `linalg_adversarial_cases.json`: hostile linalg inputs with expected fail-closed reason-code classes.
 - `ufunc_input_cases.json`: differential ufunc/reduction input corpus.
 - `ufunc_metamorphic_cases.json`: deterministic metamorphic checks (commutativity, linearity).
 - `ufunc_adversarial_cases.json`: adversarial ufunc inputs expecting controlled errors.
-- `workflow_scenario_corpus.json`: user workflow golden journeys linking differential fixtures, e2e scripts, and prioritized gap beads.
+- `workflow_scenario_corpus.json`: user workflow golden journeys linking differential fixtures, e2e scripts, and prioritized gap beads (including packet `FNP-P2C-004` iterator replay scenarios).
 - `oracle_outputs/ufunc_oracle_output.json`: captured NumPy oracle outputs.
 - `oracle_outputs/ufunc_differential_report.json`: comparator report against current Rust implementation.
+- `oracle_outputs/iter_differential_report.json`: machine-readable mismatch report for packet `FNP-P2C-004` iterator differential checks.
+- `oracle_outputs/io_differential_report.json`: machine-readable mismatch report for packet `FNP-P2C-009` IO differential checks.
 - `oracle_outputs/linalg_differential_report.json`: machine-readable mismatch report for packet `FNP-P2C-008` differential checks.
